calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, KENDALL CONNER-BEVILACQUA
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for Change of Name of minor Kendall Conner-Bevilacqua.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:27:38 a.m., and concluding at 10:45:51 a.m. (D505)

Jennifer Isensee, Esq. representing Petitioner Jessica Bevilacqua who was placed under oath and testfied via Zoom Video Conference.
Emma Rubotton, Esq. representing Respondent Jonathan Connor who was placed under oath but did not testify via Zoom Video Conference.

Notice of hearing filed and sent by the court on Nov-20-2024.

The matter is argued.

After hearing both arguments and reviewing the declarations, the Court DENIES Petitioner's request for Change of Name of Minor Kendall Conner-Bevilacqua.

Petitioner's counsel to prepare a proposed order denying petitioner's request and submit to the court for signature.

HEARING ON PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, KENDALL CONNER-BEVILACQUA
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Jan-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
